# Transcrição: Unpopular_opinion_about_authenticity

- **Fonte:** Unpopular_opinion_about_authenticity
- **Duração:** 01:01
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 01:01]

The world we live in now, people are obsessed about being authentic. They're like, no, no, that's acting. That's fake. That's bullshit. That's phony. No, don't like it. There's no such thing as this, this, this true, true, true authentic thing. We are all acting. Right now, this is my archetype as a teacher. There are so many versions of me. When I talk to my wife, that's a different version of me. When I'm with my son, it's a different version of me. When you go to improv class, it's you exploring all the different versions of you. Let's not get so caught up in this authenticity thing because I know people who pretend to be authentic and that's not good either. But because they're so good at pretending to be authentic, people perceive them to be authentic. So let's not get obsessed over this thing of, oh, it's not natural. No, look, we're all doing our best. We're all trying our best to get through this thing called life. So don't create more difficulty for yourself by being obsessed about this authenticity thing. You're all wonderfully authentic, even when you feel like you've been inauthentic. That's you being on your journey towards authenticity.
